channel.title: New TV Shows
channel.description: TV shows airing today on Netflix, Disney+, MGM+, Apple TV+, Prime Video

item.title: Super Market
item.description: Super Market is the new Italian Prime Original comedy series written and directed by the Il Terzo Segreto di Satira collective, following the tragicomic events of Eury, a chaotic neighborhood supermarket facing closure

item.title: Undercover Lover
item.description: Five couples convinced their love is unbreakable take on the ultimate challenge in a game where temptation calls the shots. Their goal is clear: to win €50,000. Separated from their partners and immersed in the sizzling atmosphere of a tropical paradise, one half of each couple must pose as a single, surrounded by attractive singles with a single mission: to expose them. From a second villa, their partners watch helplessly as their loved one flirts, seduces, and pushes boundaries. Every glance, every touch, and every whispered word could mean the difference between winning and betrayal. How far will you go to keep your love a secret? And what happens when the game starts to feel more real than reality itself?

item.title: Young Farts Trailer Parts
item.description: Small-town brothers Jagger and Dawson run Young Farts RV Parts, a multi-million-dollar business where they turn trailer trash into cash. Between outrageous schemes, chaotic stunts, and big-hearted hijinks, these brothers chase one wild idea after the next - all for the love of their family and the empire they’re building.

item.title: Criminal
item.description: A random mass stabbing, major food company Titus Foods, and a mysterious infant disease. These three things have as much in common as Detective Soma, hack writer Yarimizu, and the stabbing's lone survivor, Shuji. Yet, these men are now embroiled in a risky quest for the truth. What they find, though, is more heinous than they imagined, making them question just who is the real criminal?

item.title: The Map of Longing
item.description: Before her death, Lucy creates a game for her sister, Greta, pushing her into a journey of self-discovery — and toward the charming Will Tucker.

item.title: The East Palace
item.description: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

item.title: The Loyalty Game
item.description: A group of women runs a unique business: luring men to expose their infidelity. Their newest client, Ana, lives a seemingly perfect life with her devoted husband-until doubt creeps in. As he starts to distort her reality, Ana teams up with a loyalty tester, and their search for truth spirals into a dangerous game of secrets, manipulation, and power-where loyalty becomes a matter of life and death.

item.title: Alliance
item.description: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. Sixteen celebrities are split into four teams, battling through physical and mental challenges to earn points-the only currency inside a mysterious HQ run by the System. Face the Ace's power, survive weekly votes, and rebuild alliances every reset.

item.title: The Adam Ray Show
item.description: Step inside the hilarious, shape-shifting world of Adam Ray. The renowned comedian meets up with today’s funniest people and most fascinating stars, blending deep-dive conversations with his signature improvised character work.

item.title: Ticket to the Tribes
item.description: In the new reality show, 12 Dutch and Flemish celebrities live together with the Himba community in Namibia. This means that the participants must live without modern amenities and adapt to the tribe's way of life. The participants are judged on their commitment and respect for the culture. The celebrities who adapt the least are eliminated. Ultimately, one participant remains. This person is appointed an honorary member by the community.

item.title: Shut Up Evan
item.description: Shut Up Evan is a twice-weekly pop culture podcast hosted by Evan Ross Katz, featuring “The Group Chat,” a rotating panel with celebrity guests unpacking the zeitgeist, and “Deep in the DMs With…,” intimate one-on-one conversations with your favorite actors, musicians, and tastemakers shaping the culture.

item.title: Páginas da Vida
item.description: Nanda dies after giving birth to twins, Francisco and Clara. Marta, the maternal grandmother, agrees to keep the boy, but gives the girl, who has Down syndrome, up for adoption. Helena, the doctor who delivers the baby, becomes attached to the child and secretly adopts her. Years later, Leo returns to Portugal and discovers he is a father. In an attempt to regain custody of the children, he relies on Marta's opportunistic support. But Helena is determined to fight him for Clara's guardianship. Remake of the Brazilian telenovela of the same name.

item.title: The Pete Davidson Show
item.description: Comedian Pete Davidson welcomes friends and fampu faces for an intimate weekly hangout at the most exclusive venue in New York — his garage.

item.title: Wild Tripper!!
item.description: Wild Tripper!! follows Yugo Kochi as he undertakes physically and mentally demanding journeys through natural environments across Japan.

item.title: India's Got Latent
item.description: Samay Raina and the guest judges hilariously critique the untapped, undeniably entertaining "latent" talents of aspiring performers, testing their self-awareness with a unique scoring system.

item.title: LOL: Last One Laughing Poland
item.description: Cezary Pazura invites ten comedy stars and entertainment personalities to a unique challenge, where they can’t laugh for six hours. Contestants try everything to make others laugh while keeping a poker face at the same time. Those who can’t make it are out of the game. See who will be the last one laughing!

item.title: La promesa
item.description: In 1913 Spain, a woman gets a job at the palace of La Promesa as a reward for saving the marquesses' son - but nobody knows that she has her own plans, which involve avenging her mother's death and finding her missing brother.

item.title: Power of Love
item.description: A group of competitive women and men come together in The Power of Love to find their dream partner. Every week, some contestants win the weekly prize, while others say goodbye to their dreams of love and the house. Emotional moments, surprises, and exciting challenges await in this thrilling season!

item.title: Good Mythical Morning
item.description: Two "Internetainers" (Rhett & Link) go far out and do the weirdest things, giving you a daily dose of casual comedy every Monday-Friday.
